source_pr.title: fix the bug of double read with order and limit
source_pr.body:
When the index scanner want to keep datas order, it shouldn't set limit to table scan read.
@shenli @zimulala @coocood PTAL

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by a limit 3") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by a limit 3") (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR (fix the bug of double read with order and limit) appears to be primarily a functional/correctness/change or test refactor. The current evidence does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient_evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by a limit 3") (executor/executor_test.go)
